name: molcrafts
description: Claude Code-first workflows and maintenance tooling for MolCrafts scientific software projects.

plugins.name: mol
plugins.description: Project workflow toolkit — 27 skills + 20 single-axis agents organized around the planner→generator→evaluator harness pattern. Adapts per project via mol_project frontmatter.

plugins.name: mol-plugin
plugins.description: Maintenance toolkit for the MolCrafts marketplace — scaffold, audit, smoke-test, and release skills and plugins.
